description: Active and prospect funders, with the narrative claims that should lead any pitch to them. Used by narrative-draft.mjs --funder <slug> to assemble pitch briefs targeted to the right thesis.

minderoo.name: Minderoo Foundation
minderoo.tone: communities-first, evidence-rich, place-based, structurally honest, board-defensible
minderoo.framing_notes: Minderoo's current public strategy is Communities-first: place-based engagement, local knowledge and lived experience, stronger child and family supports, and vibrant connected communities. Lead with the anchor-community hold, not JusticeHub as a product. JusticeHub is the evidence layer under the community work; The Brave Ones is the human trace layer; the library is the destination, not the opening noun. Use Minderoo's own role language where possible: Partner, Develop, Generate Evidence, Advocate. Primary ask: $2.9M over 3 years (the canonical Three Circles ask). Best staged entry: $780K for Year 1 with a pathway into Years 2-3. Use the older $3.43M Crescendo frame only if Lucy invites ACT upward into the expanded library / artefact expression. Avoid the confrontational frame — they fund builders, not critics. Source docs: three-circles.md (canonical pitch), how-should-act-pitch-minderoo-in-line-with-its-current-strategy-and-what-money-f.md (strategy synthesis), and the-full-idea.md (comprehensive walkthrough).
minderoo.pause_note: Lucy paused justice conversations 2026-05-14 — Minderoo internal restructure. Re-engage Q3 FY27 or on her signal.

qbe-catalysing-impact.name: QBE Catalysing Impact
qbe-catalysing-impact.primary_contact: Jay Boolkin (SIH admin) / Matt Allen (Goods diagnostic)
qbe-catalysing-impact.framing_notes: Investor language. Lead with the delivered cost number, the decision band, the handover binary. Do NOT pitch this as a charity case. Do NOT show up without the actual cost report — the whole point of the cost report doc is that QBE will not move without it.
qbe-catalysing-impact.administration_note: Relationship runs through Social Impact Hub admin team, not QBE direct. Catalysing Impact 2026 cohort.

dusseldorp-forum.name: Dusseldorp Forum
dusseldorp-forum.primary_contact: Jessica Duffy / Margot Beach (Teya + Rachel CC)
dusseldorp-forum.framing_notes: Dusseldorp already funds — this is a deepening relationship, not a new ask. Lead with the education angle (18% of detained kids complete education), then young-people-as-experts. They have the education frame in their DNA.

paul-ramsay-foundation.name: Paul Ramsay Foundation
paul-ramsay-foundation.framing_notes: Stage upgraded from cold 2026-04-24: Xero shows 2 paid invoices (small, $7,469 total) and William Frazer is tagged partner+justicehub in GHL — relationship is warmer than cold. Last comm 80 days ago (hello@ address, early Feb). PRF thinks deeply about systems change. Lead with the cost evidence, then the verified-intervention engine (ALMA), then the platform stack as the system-change lever. PRF will be skeptical of 'two people built it with hands' — for them, lead with infrastructure, not artisanship.

tim-fairfax.name: Tim Fairfax Family Foundation
tim-fairfax.framing_notes: Tim Fairfax loves regional and community-led. Lead with Room 3 (Mounty Yarns, PICC, Oonchiumpa) and the touring model. The container-as-method is a creative-practice claim that lands well here.

smith-family.name: The Smith Family
smith-family.framing_notes: Highest-scoring funder in our system. Frame around educational outcomes — 18% of detained kids complete education vs the alternatives' completion rates.

amnesty-australia.name: Amnesty International Australia
amnesty-australia.tone: rights-based, structurally honest, willing to confront
amnesty-australia.framing_notes: Amnesty is one of the few funders for whom the confrontational frame is the right pitch. Lead with 21x overrepresentation, then the political-will claim, then the failure rate. They want partners who will name it.

niaa.name: National Indigenous Australians Agency
niaa.framing_notes: Procurement audience under the Indigenous Procurement Policy. Lead with the enterprise framing — Goods on Country is an IPP-eligible community-owned enterprise, not a social program.

jcf.name: June Canavan Foundation
jcf.framing_notes: UNVERIFIED STAGE as of 2026-04-24: wiki claims active-partner + $60K but Xero has no JCF invoice. Validate the relationship status with Nic before drafting from this entry. If confirmed, keep framing below. JCF has 5 years remaining in their mandate ('15 Down — 5 To Go'). They want impact storytelling for fundraising / wind-down. The Tanzania + Rwanda Africa visit (Sep 2025) is the entry point. Pitch as a multi-year retainer ($40-80K/yr) — not a project grant. We deliver the platform, the editorial pipeline, the annual reports, and the consent-respecting story library across all JCF beneficiaries. The world tour visits the African beneficiaries directly — fieldwork at no marginal cost.

atlassian-foundation.name: Atlassian Foundation
atlassian-foundation.framing_notes: Atlassian Foundation funds platform-shaped impact work. Lead with the technical architecture (one database, four layers, 100K+ entities) and the R&D claim of the world tour as a 12-context sovereignty stress test. They will recognise the patterns. World tour funder sponsorship pitch ($150-400K) belongs here.

snow-foundation.name: The Snow Foundation
snow-foundation.framing_notes: Active multi-tranche partner. Xero shows $402,930 received + $132,000 AUTHORISED across 7 tranches over 14 months (INV-0321 $132K currently outstanding 37d). No single canonical ask — relationship funds in rolling tranches on project ACT-GD. Last comm 10 days ago, warm. Next action (only-Ben): call Sally or Alexandra to confirm INV-0321 payment AND flag Pty migration — from 1 July 2026 tranches invoice to A Curious Tractor Pty Ltd ACN 697 347 676. Tour funder sponsorship candidate. Lead with the closed-loop framing and the regional / Indigenous-led work.

patagonia.name: Patagonia Environmental + Social Initiatives
patagonia.framing_notes: Patagonia funds environmental-justice work that names corporate power. Goods on Country — recycled plastic, on-Country manufacturing, community-owned enterprise — is a fit. The world tour's regen-ag chapters (Witta, Black Cockatoo, Rwanda coffee) extend the fit. Pitch as field research for a global dignified-essential-goods category.

allbirds.name: Allbirds
allbirds.framing_notes: B-Corp with materials-science DNA. Stretch Bed material story (HDPE, canvas, galvanised steel) is a natural conversation. Smaller funder, but a credible co-sponsor for the tour.

who-gives-a-crap.name: Who Gives A Crap
who-gives-a-crap.framing_notes: Australian B-Corp that built a business out of dignified essentials. Goods on Country is a sister category. Tour co-sponsor candidate. Their 50% donation model maps to the Goods enterprise model conceptually.

centrecorp.name: Centrecorp Foundation
centrecorp.framing_notes: Active partner via Goods on Country Production Plant. Tranche 1 ($85,712) paid Nov 2025. Tranche 2 (INV-0314 $84,700) currently DRAFT 70 days old pending only-Ben decision — send / void / reissue-from-Pty post-cutover. Named in Goods → Minderoo pitch as live pipeline. See thoughts/shared/drafts/centrecorp-feb-2026-invoice-forensics.md for history. Lead with completed-plant evidence and unit economics, not a fresh pitch — relationship is built.

rotary-eclub-outback.name: Rotary eClub of Outback Australia
rotary-eclub-outback.framing_notes: BLOCKED awaiting only-Ben decision: INV-0222 $82,500 AUTHORISED 2025-04-10 is 380 days unpaid on the sole trader's books. No GHL comm history. Decision needed before 30 June 2026 cutover — chase for payment or write off as bad debt on sole trader's FY26 close-out BAS. GHL stub 'Invoicing Rotary eClub Outback Australia' has no named human — if someone from Rotary emails, the CRM won't route. Do not draft a fresh pitch until the payment disposition is resolved.

vincent-fairfax.name: Vincent Fairfax Family Foundation
vincent-fairfax.framing_notes: DATA-ONLY STUB added 2026-04-24: Xero shows $50,000 paid historically, no current GHL comm. Not to be confused with Tim Fairfax Family Foundation (tim-fairfax slug) — separate foundation. Needs Nic-verified narrative review before pitch-assembly. Until then, narrative-draft.mjs --funder vincent-fairfax will error — that's intentional.

social-impact-hub.name: Social Impact Hub Foundation
social-impact-hub.framing_notes: DATA-ONLY STUB added 2026-04-24: Xero shows $26,730 paid historically, no current GHL comm. Needs Nic-verified narrative review before pitch-assembly.

state-qld-dfsdscs.name: State of Queensland (DFSDSCS)
state-qld-dfsdscs.framing_notes: DATA-ONLY STUB added 2026-04-24: Qld Department of Families, Seniors, Disability Services and Child Safety. Xero shows $22,000 paid historically. Government grant, not a philanthropic funder — route through procurement / gov-grants pipeline if re-engaging, not funder-narrative tooling.

streetsmart-australia.name: StreetSmart Australia
streetsmart-australia.primary_contact: Adam Robinson (CEO) / Isabella Stanley / Alan White
streetsmart-australia.framing_notes: DATA-ONLY STUB added 2026-04-24: Xero shows $9,400 paid, GHL shows recent comm 26 days ago (also 105-day prior thread). Active relationship but narrative not yet captured — needs Nic/Ben context on what ACT delivers for StreetSmart before claims can be populated.

westpac-scholars-trust.name: Westpac Scholars Trust
westpac-scholars-trust.framing_notes: DATA-ONLY STUB added 2026-04-24: Xero shows $3,080 paid historically, no current GHL comm. Small historical amount. Needs Nic-verified narrative review before pitch-assembly.

rotary-eclub-outback-australia-9560.name: Rotary Eclub Outback Australia, Division 9560
rotary-eclub-outback-australia-9560.framing_notes: DATA-ONLY STUB added 2026-05-07: Xero shows $82,500 AUTH on INV-0222 (392 days outstanding); funder-alignment synthesis flags this as the longest-overdue live invoice on the sole trader. stages.cold: No prior contact. First touch needed.
stages.warm-cold: Prior contact, gone cold. Re-engagement pitch.
stages.warm: Active conversation, no ask on the table yet.
stages.term-sheet-pending: In due diligence / term sheet drafting.
stages.lapsed: Was an active partner, now silent.
stages.procurement-prospect: Not a grant funder — a buyer under procurement programs.
